meta.title: How I Lowered My Body Fat Percentage by 8% in 4 Months
meta.page_title: How I Lowered My Body Fat Percentage by 8% in 4 Months

sections.content: I lowered my body fat percentage by focusing on simple repeatable habits rather than an extreme training plan. The important part was to make every week measurable.
The first habit was protein at every meal. The second habit was a daily walk after lunch. The third habit was resistance training three times a week with progressive overload.
Progress chart across the first four months.

assets.caption: Progress chart across the first four months.

sections.content: Weekly photos, waist measurements, and a simple calorie range made the plan easier to follow. I adjusted only when the trend stopped moving for two consecutive weeks.
